testing_progress.highlight: devnet-4 multi-subnet interop abandoned; all teams now focused on devnet-5
Zeam: devnet-5 single-subnet finalization confirmed; 4-subnet runs in progress with late message publishing under investigation
Ream: 24-node/4-aggregator/6-node-per-subnet devnet-4 infra running; memory growth resolved; finalization still bursty
Pata: 32-node Zeam-only 4-subnet devnet-5 run progressing; several issues already reported to teams

client_updates.highlight: Qlean: devnet-5 image released; Qlean-to-Qlean finalization not yet achieved
Ethlambda: RocksDB descriptor-limit fix, LeanVM bumped to devnet-4 latest, invalid attestation bit rejection added; EL integration with ethrex ongoing
Gean: LeanVM bump merged; devnet-5 stabilization in progress against Pata's reported issues
Grandine: devnet-5 changes under local testing; image publish imminent
Lantern (chat): devnet-5 image on commit 8fcd; locally updated to 3f2116d; gossip decoding error (reported by Pata) root-cause investigation underway

lean_spec_and_leanvm.highlight: lean spec refactored: internal py tests removed, replaced by consumable test vectors with uniform given/when/then structure
CI time cut from ~40 min to ~4 min by mocking proofs/verification in non-crypto tests; real crypto tests isolated to dedicated folder
Monolithic spec.py split into separate files: state transition, fork choice, etc.
LeanVM: ZK allocator now available without manual global-allocator setup; work begun on making LeanVM genuinely ZK
SHA-256 arithmetization for LeanVM underway (grant contributor Onyur); targeting precompile with lookup constraints

network_performance.highlight: 64-node single-subnet sim: aggregation topic generating ~60 MB/slot per node due to GossipSub duplicates; tuning needed
Block propagation P95 ~2 s at 50 Mbps bandwidth cap (EIP-7870 baseline); slot duration increase (4 s → 6 s) or interval rebalancing proposed

action_items.action: All client teams: include aggregator-slot metric from leanMetrics PR #36 in next devnet-5 images
Test locally with 12 GB container RAM limit to match devnet server constraints

decisions.decision: devnet-4 public interop runs discontinued; devnet-5 is the active target for all multiclient testing
8-attestation-data entries per block is a maximum, not a requirement; proposers may include fewer to meet proof deadline

targets.target: Lantern devnet-5 image with leanMetrics PR #36 metric — next image release (imminent)
